models.Category: A grouping label used to organize needs (e.g. Baby Clothing, Feeding).
models.Need: A specific item the ministry is requesting donations of. Tracks quantity needed, quantity already claimed, an optional brand or store preference, and a category.

relationships: Need belongs to a Category via categoryId
A Need's claimedCount reflects how many donor commitments have been made against it

needs.name: Onesies (0–3 Month)
needs.description: Short and long sleeve newborn onesies in any color or pattern.

needs.name: Footed Sleepers (3–6 Month)
needs.description: Warm footed pajamas, zipper closure preferred for easy nighttime changes.

needs.name: Newborn Hat & Mitten Set
needs.description: Soft knit hat and mittens for a newborn.

needs.name: Baby Bottles (Set of 4)
needs.description: Slow-flow nipple bottles suitable for newborns. Great for supplementing or bottle feeding.

needs.name: Burp Cloths (Set of 5+)
needs.description: Absorbent muslin or terry cloth burp cloths. The more the better!

needs.name: Nursing Cover
needs.description: A lightweight, breathable nursing cover for use at home or out in public.

needs.name: Swaddle Blankets (Set of 3)
needs.description: Stretchy muslin swaddle blankets — excellent for swaddling, nursing cover, or tummy time mat.

needs.name: White Noise Machine
needs.description: Portable sound machine to help baby sleep through household noise. Rechargeable preferred.

needs.name: Baby Wash & Lotion Set
needs.description: Gentle, fragrance-free wash and lotion for newborn skin. Hypoallergenic formulas preferred.
needs.brandPreference: Cetaphil Baby or Burt's Bees Baby

needs.name: Baby Nail Kit
needs.description: Safe nail file and trimmer set for newborns.

needs.name: Postpartum Recovery Kit
needs.description: Includes perineal spray, pads, and sitz bath soak to support mom's recovery after delivery. This is one of the most-requested items — we can never have too many.

needs.name: Nursing Pads (Disposable, Box of 60)
needs.description: Disposable nursing pads to prevent leakage during the early weeks of breastfeeding.
